name: Pearl
property: Nacre thickness: 0.4mm minimum. Luster: 7/10+ GIA scale.
temporal: Brightens with skin contact over years. The oils from your hands feed the nacre.

name: Jade
property: Microcrystalline interlocking structure. Toughest natural gemstone — fracture-resistant, not brittle.
temporal: Develops deeper translucency with handling. Centuries of touch polish what no machine can replicate.

name: Amber
formation: 30–50 million years of fossilized tree resin
property: Organic gemstone. Warm to touch. Each piece contains a unique record of prehistoric atmosphere.
temporal: Darkens gradually, concentrating its color over decades. Inclusions become more visible as the matrix shifts.

name: Wood
formation: 60–200 years of growth, 18–36 months of air-drying
property: Moisture content: 8–12%. Selection ratio: 200 boards inspected per 8 selected.
temporal: Grain deepens with light exposure. Oil finish matures over years. The wood teaches you its age.

name: Silver
epoch: Geological: hydrothermal vein formation over millions of years
property: Third-party assay verified. Working methods: forging, wire weaving, patination.
temporal: Develops patina where skin meets metal. Darkens in creases, brightens on surfaces. Your life writes itself into the silver.

name: Bronze
epoch: The alloy that named an age of civilization
property: Patina development tested before use. Living finish by design — no lacquer.
temporal: Oxidizes from warm gold to deep brown over years. Each environment creates a unique surface diary.
